title: Payment Pools
description: Payment pools coordinate shared UTXOs and internal balance updates to reduce on-chain footprint. They rely on covenant-like constraints to keep exits and rebalances safe.

resources.title: BTC Transcripts: payment-pools
resources.notes: Discussion of state-management and exit complexity.
